overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 exploring a dark underground ripperdoc clinic. The player observes a medical procedure on a body, passes by NPCs including a masked doctor and armed guards, and explores industrial back areas with scaffolding, green neon lighting, and ventilation systems.

events.description: camera pans right from the operating table to reveal the armed guard standing in the background

agents.ego_description: standing near the operating table, observing the masked doctor working on the body

notable_agents.action: masked doctor leaning over the body on the table, performing a medical procedure
armed guard standing with a rifle, observing the operating area

entered.detail: large table covered with red cloth, holding a body with blood stains
metal tray containing various medical tools and implements
rolling cart with electronic medical monitors and supplies
large structural concrete pillar supporting the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dimly lit underground operating area where a masked doctor works on a bloody body lying on a red table. Medical equipment and surgical tools are visible nearby. An armed guard stands watch in the background as the camera slowly pans right to reveal more of the industrial facility.

events.description: character drinking against the wall turns and raises hand in a gesture toward the player
camera moves past the drinking character and the armed guard, heading deeper into the facility

agents.ego_description: walking past the operating area through an industrial corridor, passing by NPCs

notable_agents.action: character drinking from a bottle against the graffiti wall, then turning to gesture at the player
armed guard holding a rifle and watching the player pass by

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in blue and black spray paint graffiti
red and white striped concrete barrier with warning signs
industrial metal scaffolding structure against the wall
scattered newspapers and trash littering the concrete floor

segments.scene_description: Moving past the operating area into a narrow industrial corridor with graffiti-covered walls. A character drinks against the wall before acknowledging the player, while an armed guard watches from nearby. The floor is littered with debris and newspapers as the camera advances toward the back of the facility.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial maintenance area with ventilation systems

events.description: moving into area with prominent green neon tube lighting illuminating the graffiti
approaching a character working at a large green industrial container with a body inside

agents.ego_description: navigating through industrial scaffolding and debris toward the back of the facility where natural light enters

notable_agents.action: worker in tactical gear leaning over a large green container, handling a body inside

entered.detail: massive industrial ventilation fans mounted on the back wall
fluorescent green neon light tubes running along the scaffolding
metal barrel with open flames providing warm light
large green metal container with 'TRAUMA TEAM' label, holding a body
extensive metal scaffolding structure with multiple levels

segments.scene_description: Exploring the deep industrial back area with prominent green neon lighting and massive ventilation fans. The camera moves through scaffolding past burning barrels and graffiti-covered walls, approaching a worker handling a body inside a large green Trauma Team container near a bright window opening.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a grim medical operating area into the depths of a neon-lit industrial facility. It begins in a dimly lit underground space where a masked doctor works on a bloody body atop a red table, with an armed guard standing watch as the camera slowly pans right. As the view shifts away from the surgical tools, the camera advances into a narrow corridor characterized by graffiti-covered walls, debris-strewn floors, and a character leaning against the wall. The scene then expands into the industrial back area, where the lighting transitions to a prominent green neon glow amidst massive ventilation fans and scaffolding. Finally, the camera moves past burning barrels and graffiti toward a bright window opening, approaching a worker handling a body inside a large green Trauma Team container.
